description: Wave 2 regression tests for output_root null handling and repo-root propagation, derived from the PR #314-#320 Codex note retrospective audit. Confirms that two FIXED_ALREADY findings remain fixed in current main. Mock execution only.

2.description: Regression tests for output_root null normalization and repo-root propagation. Repair-plan artifact generation approved. Live execution, live Claude, and autocoder batch are NOT approved. Unlocked after Wave 1 completion report is reviewed and approved.

tasks.goal: Add a regression test confirming that _normalize_task_packet sets output_root to batch_tasks_dir/task_id when the task packet has output_root: null, and that validate_task_constraints passes the normalized packet.

action.success_criteria: The new test calls _normalize_task_packet with output_root: null, asserts the normalized packet has output_root set to batch_output_root/tasks/task_id, and asserts validate_task_constraints passes on the normalized result.
action.deliverable: A new pytest test function test_output_root_null_normalized_before_validation in tests/test_run_autocoder_batch.py, using the existing fixtures (tmp_path, unique_id, etc.). The test must pass on current main without modifying any existing code.

tasks.notes: The P1 concern in PR #319 was that validate_task_constraints rejects null output_root BEFORE normalization. Code inspection (run_autocoder_batch.py:254-276) shows _normalize_task_packet runs FIRST, setting output_root at line 267, then validate_task_constraints (line 347) validates the normalized packet. No bug exists but a regression test ensures this call-order is never reversed.

tasks.goal: Add a regression test confirming that the batch controller passes --repo-root <task_worktree_path> to the stage-2 single-task controller subprocess when executing a task.

action.success_criteria: The new test mocks subprocess.Popen, calls _execute_single_task with a real task dict, and asserts that the '--repo-root' argument is present in the subprocess call args with the correct task_worktree_path value.
action.deliverable: A new pytest test function test_repo_root_passed_to_stage2_executor in tests/test_run_autocoder_batch.py. The test must pass on current main without modifying any existing production code.

tasks.notes: The P1 concern in PR #317 was that repo root was not propagated into the stage-2 executor. Code inspection (run_autocoder_batch.py:596-609) shows '--repo-root', str(task_worktree_path) is passed at line 603. The fix was included in PR #317 head (commit 3e85e936). No regression test existed at the time. Wave 2 adds one.
